meaning: International Table Tennis Federation 国际乒乓球联合会
examples: The ITTF lays down the rules for international competitions.
The ITTF says that all nations have agreed in principle to compete.
The next step is for ITTF is to come up with the event structure.
The ITTF says key government officials and diplomats from the competing nations will be in the stands cheering their country on.
